message:
feat(workflows/runner): tick 222 WorkflowRunner::resume_incomplete_with_cx — final orphan from tick-187 pending list (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Adds the Cx-threaded sibling of WorkflowRunner::resume_incomplete, closing
the final orphan from tick-187's pending list in the ongoing ft-xbnl0.2.3
Cx-first migration.

The new resume_incomplete_with_cx threads the caller-provided Cx through
the entire restart-resume chain:

- storage.find_incomplete_workflows_with_cx(cx) for the initial query
  (replaces find_incomplete_workflows which swallows the cx signal)
- cx.checkpoint() between each workflow record so a cancel fired
  mid-restart cleanly aborts instead of resuming all N incomplete
  workflows the caller never asked for
- engine.resume_cx(cx, &storage, &record.id) for the state-load step
  (tick 188 migration sibling of engine.resume)
- run_workflow_with_cx(cx, pane_id, workflow, &execution.id, next_step)
  for the actual execution (tick 178 entry point, already fully
  cx-threaded through run_workflow_inner as of ticks 178-187)

Lock acquisition, workflow-name lookup, and tracing all carry an
explicit_cx=true field for observability so log readers can distinguish
cx-threaded resumes from the legacy path.

Feature-gated on asupersync-runtime, matching the rest of the Cx surface.
The legacy resume_incomplete remains for callers not yet migrated.

Non-destructive: pure addition of 112 lines, no behavior change to
existing methods.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
